title: Nova Client
description: Nova Client is an all-in-one Fabric client mod for Minecraft focused on PvP, HUD customization, minimap tools, performance tweaks, and quality-of-life features.
body:
Nova Client is a lightweight all-in-one client mod for Minecraft Java Edition built on Fabric. It is designed to give players a cleaner PvP experience, better HUD control, useful utility modules, and a modern in-game client feel without needing a separate launcher.

Features include:

Toggleable client modules,
Custom in-game click GUI,
HUD editor with movable and scalable widgets,
Keystrokes,
CPS counter,
Armor status,
Potion effects,
Coordinates display,
Waypoints,
Minimap,
Toggle sprint / toggle sneak,
Auto GG,
Chat filter,
Fullbright,
Basic performance-focused tweaks,
Nova Client is meant to be simple to use, fast to load, and easy to expand over time.

Compatibility

Minecraft Java Edition
Fabric
Designed for Minecraft 1.21.x
Requires Fabric API
Notes
This project is still in active development, so some systems may change or improve over time.


CONTROLS: Hud editor:H
          GUI: RIGHT SHIFT
          Map:M
          Minecraft settings: Gui:2
